description: Complete the recommendations package barrel export and add data-pipeline package with full event streaming, ETL, aggregation, and metrics systems
steps: Create packages/recommendations/src/index.ts barrel exporting all 13 core modules: CollaborativeFilter, ContentBasedFilter, HybridEngine, NeuralCF, MatrixFactorization, RealtimePersonalizer, CrossAppRecommender, TrendingDetector, DiversityInjector, FeedbackProcessor, ContextEngine, ColdStartHandler, RecommendationAB, and all types from types.ts

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/types.ts with all interfaces: Topic, Partition, ConsumerGroup, Offset, Message, ETLStage, ExtractConfig, TransformConfig, LoadConfig, Pipeline, DeadLetterEntry, BatchJob, CronSchedule, AggregationWindow, WindowType (tumbling/sliding), FactTable, DimensionTable, StarSchema, MaterializedView, UserSession, FunnelStep, GrowthMetrics, RevenueMetrics

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/event-stream-processor.ts - Kafka-like event streaming with topics, partitions, consumer groups, offsets, publish/subscribe, partition assignment, offset tracking, consumer rebalancing
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/etl-pipeline.ts - ETL pipeline builder with extract/transform/load stages, error handling, retry logic, pipeline composition, stage metrics
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/data-validator.ts - Schema validation engine with JSON Schema-like validation, type coercion, custom validators, schema registry
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/dead-letter-queue.ts - DLQ for failed messages with retry scheduling, max retry tracking, error categorization, manual replay
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/batch-scheduler.ts - Batch processing scheduler with cron expression parsing, job queuing, dependency management, concurrency limits
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/aggregation-engine.ts - Real-time aggregation with tumbling/sliding windows, counts/sums/averages/percentiles, watermark handling, late event processing
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/warehouse-schema.ts - Data warehouse schema definitions with star schema modeling, fact/dimension tables, slowly changing dimensions, partition strategies
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/materialized-views.ts - Materialized view system for dashboards with incremental refresh, dependency tracking, query optimization hints
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/behavior-aggregator.ts - User behavior aggregation with session reconstruction, event sequencing, funnel analysis, path analysis
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/growth-metrics.ts - Growth metrics calculator: DAU/WAU/MAU calculation, retention cohorts, churn prediction, activation rates, power user identification
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/revenue-pipeline.ts - Revenue metrics: MRR/ARR calculation, LTV estimation, CAC tracking, expansion/contraction MRR, quick ratio
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/index.ts barrel exporting all core modules and types
acceptance_criteria: packages/recommendations/src/index.ts exports all 13 core modules and types
packages/data-pipeline/src/index.ts exists with barrel exports for all 11 core modules
packages/data-pipeline/src/types.ts defines comprehensive interfaces for all modules
All files have proper TypeScript type annotations and export statements
node scripts/test.js passes (after updating requiredPackages list)
